quote: Our company bought mini badges for consecutive years and were extremely pleased with the creative designs used that incorporated our logo. David is easy to work with, transparent, and made sure that we met all of our deadlines.
author: Jordan Close - Trend Micro

quote: There would be no way we would have figured out anything minibadge related without David & Firebolt Services! He connected the dots for our company from idea to creation, and then production. Truly white glove service, and we were very thankful to have him in our corner. More than just the nuts and bolts of getting all the badges created, he offered a marketing and consultation service to help us stand out and position ourselves as unique amongst others. It certainly helped drive our brand home amongst the others and we'd work with him again 100%
author: Jack Hendrickson - Managed Methods

quote: I am writing to highly recommend the services of David and the Firebolt team. We recently collaborated with them to produce custom collectible minibadges for SAINTCON, and the results were nothing short of transformative for our presence at the event. While many promotional items end up forgotten, Firebolt’s minibadges created a tangible PULL effect. They served as a primary driver for booth traffic, bringing in attendees in record numbers. More importantly, these collectibles acted as a natural icebreaker, allowing my team to engage with a diverse range of new people in a way that felt organic rather than forced. Beyond the social engagement, the badges were a legitimate catalyst for business growth, helping us generate significant interest and clear revenue opportunities. David’s attention to detail and understanding of the CON CULTURE ensured the product was a hit. If you are looking for a creative partner to elevate your brand visibility and engagement, Firebolt Services is the gold standard.
author: JD Parady - Varonis
